---
id: app-delete
title: "Deletes an app"
description: "Deletes an app by slug. Use with care, make sure you really want to delete the app. This action cannot be undone."
sidebar_label: "Deletes an app"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Deletes an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes an app by slug. Use with care, make sure you really want to delete the app. This action cannot be undone.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
